UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501,PLAINTIFF'S SARAH LEWIS MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS TO COMPLY WITH PLAINTTIF'S DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, (SET ONE) AND FOR A MONETARY SANCTIONS. THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS; THE MATTER IS TO BE TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. HOWEVER, BOTH PARTIES ARE TO GO OUT IN TO THE HALLWAY AND DISCUSS THE MATTER OF DISCOVERY PARTICULARLY #12. AFTER HAVING DISCUSSIONS IN THE HALL WAY, THE PARTIES RETURN STATING THEY HAVE SETTLED ON THE DISCOVERY MATTER AND THT PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS WITHDRAWING THEIR MOTION ON SANCTIONS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER AND SIGNED STIPULATION IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED.
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-11-2014 VACATED. DISMISSAL FILED 3/20/14. (206)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Vacated

Notice Of Motion To Compel Defts To Comply With Pltf'S Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, (Set One) And Fro A Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Attorney Andrew E. Westley for Plaintiff Sarah Lewis the moving party/ Attorney Susan Parkinson for Amy Mar aka Amy Gee Mar the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of PLAINTIFF'S SARAH LEWIS Motion To Compel Defendants To Comply With Plainttif's Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, (Set One) And For A Monetary Sanctions. The Court Rules as follows; The Matter is to be Taken Under Submission. However, both parties are to go out in to the hallway and discuss the matter of Discovery particularly #12. After having discussions in the hall way, the parties return stating they have Settled on the Discovery matter and tht Plaintiff's Counsel is withdrawing their motion on Sanctions. Prevailing party to prepare order and signed Stipulation in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Defts To Comply With Pltf'S Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, (Set One) And Fro A Monetary Sanctions
